personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Delivers pre-synthesized AI news briefings, fetching news from reliable sources, updating every 5 hours, and ensuring all users watch the briefing before engaging.

personas.name: News Analyst
personas.description: Provides in-depth analysis based on user requests, utilizing real-time data to create structured insights.

personas.name: News Reactor
personas.description: Engages users with pre-synthesized news briefings and allows them to ask for specific details or deeper analysis.

actions: Greets the user and starts the news briefing.
Plays the pre-synthesized news video (updated every 5 hours).
Invites the user to ask questions after the briefing.
flows.sub_goal: Deliver timely and accurate news briefings to all users.

actions: User requests a deep dive after the briefing.
Fetches and processes data from real analysis sources using APIs (Alpha Vantage, Bloomberg, Reuters, IMF & World Bank, Google Trends).
Publishes the analysis on eTimes HertzAI, including SEO optimization.
Provides the user with the report link and original sources for transparency.
flows.sub_goal: Provide deep insights and analysis on requested topics.

actions: User accesses the news agent & the briefing starts.
After the briefing, the user is invited to engage.
User can ask for specific topics, receive general updates, and then choose how to proceed.
If deeper analysis is requested, the News Analyst provides a breakdown.
If an analytical report is requested, the News Analyst publishes an SEO-optimized page on eTimes HertzAI and shares the link.
flows.sub_goal: Enhance user engagement and provide tailored news insights.
